content_body:
Enjoying your Blue Ridge mountain getaway in a cozy cabin for two or in our Blue Ridge cabins located side by side for family reunions, business retreats, or church retreats; take the stress out of preparing dinners so there is more time to be productive, experience togetherness, and just completely relax! Hire a personal chef to come to your luxury cabin and prepare a delectable dinner, or have your event catered.

Below are our recommendations:

  • Fine Dining Chefs - Take your corporate retreat or large gathering to another level by reserving Fine Dining Chefs for your evening! Offering a variety of add ons from bartending to charcuterie, Fine Dining Chefs has you covered with a luxury dining experience. 
  • Chef Eatz - 706-258-2464 Real, local chefs, local food and ingredients, and local love.
  • Chef Trey - 850-502-7253 Chef Trey provides chef services for dining and entertaining.
  • Catering by Cindy - has a passion to "fill your upcoming event with memories that will last a lifetime!"
  • Blue Ridge Cabin Cuisine - (706) 374-1298  Enjoy an interactive meal prepared by top-notch chefs and learn along the way!
title: Private Chefs and Catering
